<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.2.5 Chrome/138.0.7204.251 Electron/37.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.5" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="MTgbqutwgHdbFt1WtYi_" name="版本链维护"> <mxGraphModel dx="802" dy="555" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1800" pageHeight="1200" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-1" value="" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="675" y="650" width="300" height="208" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-2" value="" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="420" width="216" height="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-3" value="" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="620" y="100" width="410" height="138" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-4" value="事务 A · 长事务 2h
min_trx_id = 300" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="650" y="145" width="146" height="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-5" value="事务 B
min_trx_id = 450" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Helvetica;fontSize=12;fontColor=default;fillColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="854" y="145" width="147" height="65" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-6" value="Purge 水位线
= 全局最小 min_trx_id = 300
由最老活跃事务锁定" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="724" y="290" width="192" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-7" value="trx_id = 100" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="595" y="460" width="146" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-8" value="trx_id = 200" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="595" y="551" width="146" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-9" value="trx_id = 350" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="755" y="690" width="146" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-10" value="trx_id = 500（最新版本）" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="724" y="779" width="208" height="51" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-11" value="锁定水位（瓶颈）" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.21;entryY=0;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-4" target="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-6"> <mxGeometry x="0.3964" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="-1" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-12" value="高于水位，不影响" style="dashed=1;dashPattern=2 3;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.79;entryY=0;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-5" target="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-6"> <mxGeometry x="0.3985" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-13" value="" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-7" target="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-14" value="" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-9" target="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-10"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-15" value="" style="startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;rounded=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-8" target="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-16" value="低于水位 → 回收" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-6" target="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-17" value="高于水位 → 堆积" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;rounded=0;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-6" target="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-18" value="活跃事务 Read View" style="text;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;fontSize=15;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="745" y="110" width="160" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-19" value="可安全清除 · trx_id &lt; 300" style="text;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="583" y="430" width="170" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hDF-r3AVCa_mVsWqPxEc-20" value="Undo 堆积区 · trx_id ≥ 300 · 不可清除" style="text;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];autosize=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="718" y="660" width="220" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
